name: Pin & Paper
description: Field-notebook editorial — a saturated legal-pad yellow page, cream pinned-paper cards, deep cobalt-blue ink for every text / border / divider, and a cinnabar-red archival pop. Heavy tight-tracked Space Grotesk headlines + numerals with DM Mono archival catalog labels. A fractal-noise paper grain, hand-drawn safety pins, and a hard cobalt-ink offset shadow (zero blur).
descriptionZh: 田野笔记编排——饱和便笺黄页面、奶油别针纸卡、深钴蓝墨作全部文字/边框/分隔，配朱砂红档案点缀。厚重紧排 Space Grotesk 标题与数字 + DM Mono 档案编目标签。分形噪点纸纹、手绘安全别针、硬钴墨偏移投影（零模糊）。
bestFor: Reports / research / notice-board / archival topics — a confident analog field-notebook register.
